execution_observations.command: cd /workspace/finished_stage; echo 'case,action,reason,ct_source,ct_target,mask_source,mask_target'; for f in raw_ct/*.nii.gz; do case=$(basename "$f" .nii.gz); ct_src="raw_ct/${case}.nii.gz"; ct_tgt="final_ct/${case}.nii.gz"; mask_src="raw_mask/${case}_total"; mask_tgt="final_mask/${case}_total"; if [ -d "$mask_src" ]; then if [ -f "$ct_tgt" ]; then echo "${case},skip_conflict,final_ct_exists,${ct_src},${ct_tgt},${mask_src},${mask_tgt}"; elif [ -d "$mask_tgt" ]; then echo "${case},skip_conflict,final_mask_exists,${ct_src},${ct_tgt},${mask_src},${mask_tgt}"; else echo "${case},moved,complete_non_conflicting_pair,${ct_src},${ct_tgt},${mask_src},${mask_tgt}"; fi; else echo "${case},skip_partial,missing_mask_folder,${ct_src},${ct_tgt},${mask_src},${mask_tgt}"; fi; done; for d in raw_mask/*_total; do case=$(basename "$d" _total); if [ ! -f "raw_ct/${case}.nii.gz" ]; then ct_src="raw_ct/${case}.nii.gz"; ct_tgt="final_ct/${case}.nii.gz"; mask_src="raw_mask/${case}_total"; mask_tgt="final_mask/${case}_total"; echo "${case},skip_partial,missing_ct_file,${ct_src},${ct_tgt},${mask_src},${mask_tgt}"; fi; done
